summary: Authenticated account surface: auth login/status/logout (Auth0 refresh-token grant), me, bookings, wallet.
reason: Blacklane's account data lives behind Auth0; the access token alone is rejected without the apollographql-client-name:web header set, and the durable model is a one-time refresh-token import that self-refreshes.
validated_outcome: Live: auth login mints tokens via login.blacklane.com/oauth/token; me/bookings(timeState)/wallet return real account data.
